data.content: 1. Requirement violation: when a knot reaches a terminal state, parent/descendant terminal handling must still work for deferred descendants. This implementation still fails the required terminal cascade case in src/app/tests_hierarchy.rs:475, where abandoning the parent errors instead of cascading the deferred child to abandoned. 2. Root cause in code under review: src/app.rs:1356 sends terminal cascade descendants through write_state_change_locked with force=false, but the deferred resume guard at src/app.rs:1283-1293 rejects any deferred descendant whose target terminal state differs from deferred_from_state. 3. Validation failed: make sanity on 2026-03-18 failed with app::tests_hierarchy::deferred_descendant_is_cascaded_in_terminal_transition, so the implementation does not satisfy the knot description or the required sanity gate.
